common.noResults: No experiments found. Try a different search or category.

hero.subtitle: Interactive 3D Science Platform
hero.description: Explore 40+ interactive experiments across Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and Mathematics. Control variables, watch simulations, and learn science like never before.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.chooseDesc: Pick from 40+ experiments across 4 scientific subjects
howItWorks.controlDesc: Adjust variables with interactive sliders and real-time controls
howItWorks.learnDesc: Watch 3D simulations and understand the science behind each experiment

footer.description: Free interactive 3D science experiments for Physics, Chemistry, Biology & Mathematics.

pendulum.title: Simple Pendulum
pendulum.description: Explore simple harmonic motion by controlling pendulum length, mass, and initial angle. Observe how gravity and tension create periodic oscillation.

projectile-motion.title: Projectile Motion
projectile-motion.description: Launch projectiles at different angles and velocities. Visualize parabolic trajectories and understand range, height, and time of flight.

double-slit.title: Double-Slit Experiment
double-slit.description: Witness wave-particle duality. Fire photons through two slits and observe the interference pattern that proves quantum mechanics.

wave-interference.title: Wave Interference
wave-interference.description: Create two wave sources and watch constructive and destructive interference patterns form in real-time 3D space.

electromagnetic.title: Electromagnetic Field
electromagnetic.description: Place charges in 3D space and visualize electric field lines, potential surfaces, and force vectors interactively.

spring-mass.title: Spring-Mass System
spring-mass.description: Attach masses to springs with adjustable stiffness and damping. Explore Hooke's law, resonance, and energy conservation.

gravitational-orbits.title: Gravitational Orbits
gravitational-orbits.description: Simulate planetary orbits by adjusting mass, velocity, and distance. Observe elliptical, circular, and escape trajectories.

doppler.title: Doppler Effect
doppler.description: Move a sound source and observer in 3D. Watch wavefronts compress and expand as frequency shifts in real-time.

refraction.title: Refraction & Reflection
refraction.description: Shoot light rays through different media. Control angle of incidence, refractive index, and see Snell's law in action.

ohms-law.title: Ohm's Law Circuit
ohms-law.description: Build circuits with resistors, batteries, and LEDs. Adjust voltage and resistance to see current flow with animated electrons.

atomic-structure.title: Atomic Structure
atomic-structure.description: Explore atoms in 3D — add/remove protons, neutrons, and electrons. See how elements change and electron shells fill up.

chemical-bonding.title: Chemical Bonding
chemical-bonding.description: Visualize ionic, covalent, and metallic bonds in 3D. Watch atoms share or transfer electrons to form molecules.

electrolysis.title: Electrolysis
electrolysis.description: Run electrolysis experiments on water and other solutions. See bubbles form at electrodes and understand redox reactions.

titration.title: Acid-Base Titration
titration.description: Perform virtual titration. Control the burette drop-by-drop and watch the pH indicator change color at the equivalence point.

gas-laws.title: Gas Laws (PV=nRT)
gas-laws.description: Compress and heat gas molecules in a 3D container. See Boyle's, Charles's, and Gay-Lussac's laws come alive with bouncing particles.

acid-base-reactions.title: Acid-Base Reactions
acid-base-reactions.description: Mix acids and bases and watch neutralization occur. See pH changes, salt formation, and energy release in 3D.

crystal-lattice.title: Crystal Lattice Structures
crystal-lattice.description: Explore 3D crystal structures — FCC, BCC, HCP, diamond cubic. Rotate, zoom, and understand unit cells and packing efficiency.

diffusion.title: Molecular Diffusion
diffusion.description: Watch particles diffuse through a membrane or between two gases. Control temperature and concentration gradients.

thermochemistry.title: Exothermic & Endothermic
thermochemistry.description: Visualize energy changes during chemical reactions. See bonds break and form with energy diagrams and temperature effects.

periodic-trends.title: Periodic Table Trends
periodic-trends.description: Interactive 3D periodic table. Explore atomic radius, electronegativity, ionization energy trends with animated visualizations.

cell-structure.title: Animal Cell Structure
cell-structure.description: Explore a detailed 3D animal cell. Click on organelles to learn about nucleus, mitochondria, ER, Golgi, and more.

dna-replication.title: DNA Replication
dna-replication.description: Watch the double helix unzip and replicate step-by-step. See helicase, polymerase, and primase in action.

protein-synthesis.title: Protein Synthesis
protein-synthesis.description: Follow transcription and translation in 3D. Watch mRNA leave the nucleus and ribosomes build proteins codon by codon.

photosynthesis.title: Photosynthesis
photosynthesis.description: Enter a chloroplast and follow light reactions and Calvin cycle. Control light intensity and CO2 levels.

cellular-respiration.title: Cellular Respiration
cellular-respiration.description: Trace glucose through glycolysis, Krebs cycle, and electron transport chain. See ATP production in 3D mitochondria.

mitosis-meiosis.title: Mitosis & Meiosis
mitosis-meiosis.description: Watch cell division in 3D. Step through prophase, metaphase, anaphase, telophase. Compare mitosis vs meiosis side-by-side.

natural-selection.title: Natural Selection Simulator
natural-selection.description: Simulate evolution! Control environment factors and watch populations adapt over generations with trait variations.

nervous-system.title: Neuron & Synapse
nervous-system.description: Trace an action potential along a neuron in 3D. Watch neurotransmitters cross the synaptic cleft.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem Food Web
ecosystem.description: Build and explore food webs in 3D. Add/remove species and watch population dynamics change in real-time.

immune-response.title: Immune System Response
immune-response.description: Watch the immune system fight a virus! See macrophages, T-cells, and antibodies in a 3D blood vessel environment.

fourier-transform.title: Fourier Transform Visualizer
fourier-transform.description: Build any waveform by adding sine waves. Watch the frequency spectrum update in real-time as you add or remove harmonics.

fibonacci-spiral.title: Fibonacci & Golden Spiral
fibonacci-spiral.description: Watch the Fibonacci sequence build the golden spiral in 3D. Explore its appearance in nature, art, and architecture.

3d-geometry.title: 3D Geometry Explorer
3d-geometry.description: Interact with Platonic solids and Archimedean solids in 3D. Explore faces, edges, vertices, and Euler's formula.

calculus-visualizer.title: Calculus Visualizer
calculus-visualizer.description: Visualize derivatives and integrals in 3D. Watch tangent lines, area under curves, and Riemann sums animate.

mandelbrot.title: Mandelbrot Fractal
mandelbrot.description: Dive into the infinite Mandelbrot set in 3D. Zoom into regions and watch fractal detail emerge at every scale.

probability-distributions.title: Probability Distributions
probability-distributions.description: Generate random data and watch distributions form. Compare Normal, Binomial, Poisson, and Uniform distributions.

linear-algebra.title: Linear Algebra Viz
linear-algebra.description: Visualize vectors, matrices, and transformations in 3D. Apply rotations, scaling, and shearing to see linear maps in action.

trigonometry.title: Trigonometry Explorer
trigonometry.description: Explore sine, cosine, and tangent on a 3D unit circle. Adjust angles and see how all trig functions relate.

complex-numbers.title: Complex Number Plane
complex-numbers.description: Visualize complex numbers on the Argand plane. Perform arithmetic operations and see geometric interpretations.

topology-surfaces.title: Topology & Surfaces
topology-surfaces.description: Explore mathematical surfaces — Möbius strip, Klein bottle, torus, and more in interactive 3D.
